title: eremogone juncea var. juncea
intro: Eremogone juncea var. juncea, also known as the Mountain Sandwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and high blood pressure. Eremogone juncea var. juncea can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can also be used in tinctures and salves.
